global.description: The ad features a warm-toned background with a clear focus on the headline and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a simple and secure signup for a financial service.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: A soft, abstract background featuring overlapping geometric shapes in warm tones.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Secure & simple Fast signup instant card' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Fast signup instant card

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text '€9.99 Claim reward' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'ClearLedger' in a clean, modern font positioned at the top of the ad.
